name: places-search
summary: Address/place autocomplete + reverse geocoding via free OpenStreetMap Nominatim — no API keys.
postInstall: No native deps and no key — Nominatim is free (OSM).

Nominatim's public server caps usage at ~1 req/sec; the hook debounces. For production volume, self-host Nominatim or swap data/nominatim.ts for a keyed provider (Google/Mapbox) behind the same model.
Pairs with nav-turn-by-turn: feed a picked place's {lat,lng} straight into useNavigation.
Replace src/features/places/ui/place-search-screen.tsx after the Claude Design pass
